file.content:
name: grahamsz.openshrooly
    version: ${device_version}
  platformio_options:
    build_flags:
      - -Wno-cpp  # Suppress preprocessor warnings (including deprecation warnings)

tool_input.new_string:
- -Wno-cpp  # Suppress preprocessor warnings (including deprecation warnings)
      - -Wno-deprecated-declarations  # Suppress deprecation warnings from ESPHome API changes

tool_response.newString:
- -Wno-cpp  # Suppress preprocessor warnings (including deprecation warnings)
      - -Wno-deprecated-declarations  # Suppress deprecation warnings from ESPHome API changes

lines: +      - -Wno-deprecated-declarations  # Suppress deprecation warnings from ESPHome API changes
